evals.prompt: Add timezone search feature to the converter CLI
evals.expected_output: Work item folder created. Stub PRD written with draft status. Folder name is a kebab-case slug. Skill tells user to run /orchestra-plan next.
assertions: prd.md frontmatter has created_on with today's date
prd.md has a title matching the ticket description
Skill tells user to run /orchestra-plan {slug} to start planning

evals.expected_output: Work item folder uses ClickUp ID as the ticket field. Stub PRD written.
assertions: prd.md frontmatter ticket field contains the ClickUp ID
Work item folder name includes the ticket ID
